title: OmniProject notification route
description: A generic, above-the-seam routing rule: which event kinds dispatch to which delivery channels (and to whom). One file per route under assets/notification-routes/<id>.json. Delivery itself stays below the seam — a route only DECIDES targets.

match.description: The event predicate. A notification matches when its kind is listed (or "*" is listed = any kind).

kinds.description: Notification kinds this route fires on (e.g. "incident", "due_soon"); "*" = any.

channels.description: Delivery channel ids from the notification catalogue (e.g. "slack", "pagerduty", "email").

audience.description: Who the dispatch is for (RBAC role). Omitted = everyone / channel default.

methodologies.description: Methodology TAGS — selecting one activates the routes sharing it. "*" = neutral/always.
